subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested the Dayspring of His Cause, and exalted be He Who remembereth His loved ones with His Tongue whereby He quickeneth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر مطلع امره و تعالی الذی یذکر احبائه بلسانه الذی به احی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @call to action, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
